workflow_listing.name: Pack 0.10 (Demo)
workflow_listing.description: Demo transaction: A $0.10 payment is submitted and automatically returned to the user. In production this is the canonical paid-workflow shape.

Price: exact | 100000 (atomic units) of 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913 on eip155:8453, payTo 0xf591c99cf53073db7b96cfb003cbcabdd3709544

auto_pay_documented_paths: agentcash: mcp__agentcash__fetch against the same endpoint
Marketplace UI: open the listing's public page and run it interactively

quorum_design_alignment.design_intent: Executor receives 402, packages as AXL message to Treasurer, waits for settle_tx_hash. Executor never holds Treasurer's private key — separation of concerns.
quorum_design_alignment.shape_match: QUORUM's X402Challenge type already mirrors this exact response schema: scheme/network/asset/amount/payTo/maxTimeoutSeconds. Wire was built against the public x402 spec before this real challenge was captured.
